## Product Doctrine Check

Read [docs/product-principles.md](../docs/product-principles.md) before asking
for review when this PR changes behavior, policy, privacy, enforcement,
evidence, user-facing workflows, module boundaries, remote export, or fleet
integration.

- [ ] This PR preserves privacy, termination safety, and local endpoint
      authority.
- [ ] If it changes a product principle or durable architecture decision, the
      relevant doc or ADR is updated in this PR.
- [ ] The live evidence above exercises the changed surface, not just unit
      internals.
